name: Hello, World
icon_prompt: A glossy 3D blue coin medallion with a stylized merge-arrow glyph (two dots connected by a curved line) embossed in the center; soft top-left highlight, subtle rim shadow
description: Submitted your very first pull request for AI review. The journey starts here.

name: Streak Starter
icon_prompt: A glossy 3D amber medallion with a stylized flame embossed in the center; warm metallic finish, subtle bevel highlight
description: Shipped a reviewed PR every day for seven consecutive days. The habit is forming.

name: Monthly Grinder
icon_prompt: A 3D teal medallion with a calendar-with-checkmark glyph in the center; cool metallic finish, soft top-left highlight
description: A full thirty days of consecutive reviewed PRs. This is no longer a habit — it's identity.

name: Active Contributor
icon_prompt: A 3D blue medallion with three rising bars (volume / activity glyph) embossed in the center; modern, polished, subtle highlight
description: Twenty-five reviewed PRs in a rolling 30-day window. You ship reliably.

name: Comeback Kid
icon_prompt: A 3D coral medallion with a circular return-arrow glyph in the center; warm finish, slight bevel and highlight
description: Returned after thirty-plus days of silence and shipped within a week. Welcome back.

name: Clean Review
icon_prompt: A 3D green medallion with a bold checkmark glyph embossed in the center; polished metallic finish, soft highlight
description: Shipped a single PR with an AI quality score of 95 or higher. One perfect deliverable.

name: Zero-Issue Author
icon_prompt: A 3D green medallion with a four-pointed sparkle/star glyph in the center; clean, sharp, with subtle bevel and corner glints
description: Five consecutive PRs with zero AI-flagged issues across all categories. Dialed in.

name: Security First
icon_prompt: A 3D purple medallion with a solid shield glyph embossed in the center; rich metallic finish, subtle top-left highlight
description: Resolved ten security flags raised by the AI reviewer. The codebase is safer for it.

name: Vulnerability Hunter
icon_prompt: A 3D purple medallion with a shield outline containing a checkmark in the center; deeper, premium finish with sharp bevel
description: Resolved fifty security flags lifetime, with zero criticals in your last fifty PRs. The hunt is yours.

name: Immaculate Codebase
icon_prompt: A 3D green medallion with stacked code-bracket glyphs embossed in the center; jewel-like finish, soft highlight
description: Fifty PRs with an average AI quality score of 90 or above. Sustained, not lucky.

name: Test-First Developer
icon_prompt: A 3D amber medallion with an embossed lab-flask glyph (rounded bottom, neck, fill line); warm metallic finish with bevel
description: Twenty-five PRs that each pushed test coverage above 80%. Tests come first, ship comes second.

name: Coverage Champion
icon_prompt: A 3D amber medallion with concentric target rings centered on a small dot; sharp bevel, premium feel
description: Lifetime coverage average of 85% or higher across at least 100 reviewed PRs. The bar stays high.

name: Doc Devotee
icon_prompt: A 3D coral medallion with an open-book glyph embossed in the center; warm finish, subtle highlight along the spine
description: Twenty-five PRs flagged 'documentation complete' by the AI reviewer. Future-you will thank present-you.

name: Performance Optimizer
icon_prompt: A 3D pink medallion with a sharp lightning-bolt glyph embossed in the center; energetic finish, crisp bevel
description: Twenty-five PRs delivered measurable performance wins (latency, allocations, throughput). Speed compounds.

name: Refactor Artisan
icon_prompt: A 3D teal medallion with a circular refresh-cycle glyph (two arrows in a loop) embossed in the center; cool finish, subtle bevel
description: Twenty-five PRs each cut complexity by ten points or more. Less code, better code.

name: Platform Pioneer
icon_prompt: A 3D amber/gold medallion with an embossed five-point crown glyph in the center; rich gold finish with strong bevel and edge highlight
description: Among the first one hundred users on the platform. The early days are yours by right.

name: Kilocoder
icon_prompt: A 3D purple medallion with an embossed trophy glyph (cup with handles, base) in the center; deep premium finish, prominent bevel
description: One thousand reviewed PRs lifetime. Few enter this room.

name: Flawless Year
icon_prompt: A 3D red medallion with a bold five-point star embossed in the center; jewel finish, sharp angular bevel
description: Three hundred and sixty-five consecutive days. A full revolution. Unbroken.

name: Polyglot Master
icon_prompt: A 3D teal medallion with an embossed globe glyph (circle with longitude/equator lines) in the center; cool premium finish
description: Five languages, each with an average AI score of 85+ across 50+ PRs. Mastery without borders.

name: Codelens Legend
icon_prompt: A 3D gold medallion with a large central star surrounded by two small sparkles; the most premium finish — heavy bevel, edge glow, rich gold
description: Earned at least fifteen badges across every category. The full set. The legend grade.
